message:
fix(dtype,ufunc,io): add NumPy shorthand dtype aliases, fix select broadcasting, and harden busday functions

dtype: Add NumPy byte-width shorthand aliases (i1/i2/i4/i8_, u1/u2/u4/u8_,
f2/f4/f8) to DType::parse(). Change Str/Structured itemsize from 0 to 1
to match NumPy's minimum. Include Complex64/Complex128 in is_float() and
simplify is_numeric() accordingly. Fix promote() to handle Structured vs
Str/Structured combinations. Expand can_cast_same_kind for temporal types.

ufunc: Fix select() to broadcast condlist and choicelist arrays against
each other instead of requiring exact size matches, matching NumPy
semantics. Add dtype input validation to is_busday (requires DateTime64)
and busday_count/busday_offset (requires DateTime64 dates and I64 offsets).
Add broadcasting support to busday_count and busday_offset. Replace
partial_cmp-based binary search in searchsorted with nan_last_cmp for
correct NaN ordering.

io: Fix Arc<[u8]> conversion for NpyArrayBytes payload construction.

linalg: Minor refinements.

Update conformance datetime differential report.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
